title: coelogyne crotalina
intro: Coelogyne crotalina, also known as the Cobra Lily or Cobra Orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine, where its rhizomes are valued for their expectorant properties, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and asthma. The medicinal properties of Coelogyne crotalina have been shown to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to alleviate symptoms of respiratory diseases and promote overall well-being. Coelogyne crotalina is often prepared as a decoction, an infusion, or a tincture, which can be administered orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
